introSection: Flash: Speed Force is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Warner Bros. Movie World in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia. It opened on 13 April 2024.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster originally operated as Surfrider at Wet'n'Wild Gold Coast from 2007 to 2020.

On July 4, 2023, Warner Bros. Movie World announced that it would be adding Flash: Speed Force. The new attraction was created by relocating and repainting Surfrider.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The track layout is essentially a giant "U", with the station located at the lowest point between two Vertical spikes. LSM technology is used to launch riders up each spike. It is situated entirely within the plot of Superman Escape.

fullText:
Flash: Speed Force is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Warner Bros. Movie World in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia. It opened on 13 April 2024.

The coaster originally operated as Surfrider at Wet'n'Wild Gold Coast from 2007 to 2020.

On July 4, 2023, Warner Bros. Movie World announced that it would be adding Flash: Speed Force. The new attraction was created by relocating and repainting Surfrider.

The track layout is essentially a giant "U", with the station located at the lowest point between two Vertical spikes. LSM technology is used to launch riders up each spike. It is situated entirely within the plot of Superman Escape.
